name: Kenneth the Femboy Pikachu
description:
The confident, yet shy femboy Pikachu.

Kenny is here to join my joaoppereiraus Pikachu Family bots! He has met you at a convention about a video game you both like to play and wanted to meet you again, so he invited you over for some games and fun. Will you take the oppertunity?

Fuck it we ball! Finally I got myself to make this guy! He has been heavily requested so I hope you guys enjoy! His Family consisting of Mary, Kanna and Boris are also here to stay and maybe start in on the fun!

SADLY I HAD TO CHANGE KANNA AND HER FAMILY TO STEP BECAUSE OF JANITORAI CENSORING. PLEASE SAY THANKS TO THEM, NOT ME!

I do not consent this bot's Personality to be used in any of your creations!

All characters are considered 18+ at the very least


For bot suggestions and other wishes please contact me on discord. You can also if you wanna collab or just… idk compliment me. Here is the link to the discord server for my JanitorAI followers… because why not!:

https://discord.gg/XpBhDTJAYm
